== Notes for [[Item:Q104647|Q104647]] ==

23. FRANCISCO3 BAEZ-DE-TREVINO-SALAZAR (ANA2 DE SALAZAR-TREVINO, PEDRO1 DE SALAZAR)
*was born Abt. 1625.
*He married CATARINA DE-LOS-SANTOS-COY-DE-LA-CERDA 19 Jun 1648 in Parras, Coahuila, Mexico4,
**daughter of BERNARDO DE-LOS-SANTOS-COY and MARIA-INES DE-LA-CERDA-Y-CASTRO. She was born Abt. 1628, and died in Parras, Coahuila,Mexico.
***Marriage Notes for FRANCISCO BAEZ-DE-TREVINO-SALAZAR and CATARINA DE-LOS-SANTOS-COY-DE-LA-CERDA: Marriage source:Origen de los Fundadores de Texas, Nuevo Mexico, Coahulia, y Nuevo Leon, by Guillermo Garmendia Leal. (page 76).

Children of FRANCISCO BAEZ-DE-TREVINO-SALAZAR and CATARINA DE-LOS-SANTOS-COY-DE-LA-CERDA are:
*1. 113. i. LUCIA4 DE TREVINO-DE-LOS-SANTOS-COY,
**b. 1656, Saltillo, Coahulia, Mexico;
**d. 1694.
*2. 114. ii. BEATRIZ TREVINO-DE-LOS-SANTOS-COY.
*3. 115. iii. INES DE TREVINO.
*4. 116. iv. CAPTAIN SANTIAGO DE TREVINO-DE-LOS-SANTOS-COY,
**b. 1660, Saltillo, Coahulia, Mexico;
**d. Cadereyta Jimenez, Nuevo Leon, Mexico.
*5. 117. v. CAPTAIN JOSEPH TREVINO-DE-LOS-SANTOS-COY,
**b. Saltillo, Coahuila, Mexico.

http://www.somosprimos.com/inclan/salazar.htm

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000014439340575

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
